prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document specifically pertains to the regulatory assessment of Torus62 Limited, which operates within England. The regulatory framework and standards mentioned, such as the Governance and Financial Viability Standard, do not apply to Scotland, as housing regulation is managed separately in Scotland under its own set of regulations and standards.
